channel.title: Lotus Lane Daily
channel.description: Daily wisdom drawn from centuries of philosophical writing, applied to the things that actually keep us up at night — burnout, anxiety, loneliness, loss, comparison. Short, honest, listenable. New episode every weekday.
channel.itunes:summary: Daily wisdom drawn from centuries of philosophical writing, applied to the things that actually keep us up at night — burnout, anxiety, loneliness, loss, comparison. Short, honest, listenable. New episode every weekday.
channel.itunes:subtitle: Wisdom for what you're going through
channel.itunes:author: The Lotus Lane

item.title: When You Can't Get Out of Bed
item.description: The fog is real. You're not lazy. Stories and ancient wisdom for the days everything feels heavy.
item.itunes:summary: The fog is real. You're not lazy. Stories and ancient wisdom for the days everything feels heavy.
item.itunes:author: The Lotus Lane

item.title: How to Deal with Jealousy
item.description: Jealousy is eating you alive. Ancient wisdom and modern stories on letting go of envy and finding your own path.
item.itunes:summary: Jealousy is eating you alive. Ancient wisdom and modern stories on letting go of envy and finding your own path.
item.itunes:author: The Lotus Lane

item.title: Everyone Is Doing Better Than Me
item.description: Instagram says everyone is thriving. You're barely surviving. Here's the truth about comparison.
item.itunes:summary: Instagram says everyone is thriving. You're barely surviving. Here's the truth about comparison.
item.itunes:author: The Lotus Lane

item.title: When Your Body Is Failing You
item.description: A diagnosis, a flare-up, a body that won't cooperate. Wisdom for living alongside illness without losing yourself.
item.itunes:summary: A diagnosis, a flare-up, a body that won't cooperate. Wisdom for living alongside illness without losing yourself.
item.itunes:author: The Lotus Lane

item.title: Caring for Someone Who Can't Care for Themselves
item.description: Aging parents, a disabled child, a sick partner — the quiet exhaustion of being the one who holds it together. You are not invisible.
item.itunes:summary: Aging parents, a disabled child, a sick partner — the quiet exhaustion of being the one who holds it together. You are not invisible.
item.itunes:author: The Lotus Lane

item.title: The 3am Mind That Won't Stop
item.description: Your body is tired but your mind won't let you sleep. What to do when anxiety runs a loop you can't escape.
item.itunes:summary: Your body is tired but your mind won't let you sleep. What to do when anxiety runs a loop you can't escape.
item.itunes:author: The Lotus Lane

item.title: When Anger Takes Over
item.description: You snap at the people you love. The rage doesn't make sense. Here's what ancient philosophy says about it.
item.itunes:summary: You snap at the people you love. The rage doesn't make sense. Here's what ancient philosophy says about it.
item.itunes:author: The Lotus Lane

item.title: Burned Out and Running on Empty
item.description: You've given everything and there's nothing left. What to do when hustle culture breaks you.
item.itunes:summary: You've given everything and there's nothing left. What to do when hustle culture breaks you.
item.itunes:author: The Lotus Lane
